page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CL processor. The instance provides 64 dedicated physical cores with 64 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource sharing.

The hardware configuration delivers 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core. This memory density is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require large datasets to reside entirely in system memory. The instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re6.16xlarge offers a specialized hardware profile that trades local storage and GPU acceleration for high memory capacity and dedicated compute resources. This makes it a qualitatively efficient option for workloads where memory capacity is the primary bottleneck, avoiding the overhead of unneeded hardware components. Suitable workloads include large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data caching applications.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CL processor, it features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a substantial 16.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads, minimizing unnecessary resource overhead. The instance is designed for memory-intensive applications such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise data processing systems.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.16xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1024 GB of RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for in-memory databases.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and dedicated Intel Xeon processing for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CL physical cores with single-thread configuration
1024.0 GB of system memory providing 16.0 GB per core
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfer
Zero local storage and no GPU accelerators to optimize resource allocation
Designed for in-memory databases, enterprise caching, and data processing
